# The app's default layout (irregular quadrilateral + rect hole +
# three drive-lines) with both offset flags on. This is the closest
# fixture to image-1 territory; lots of interior wedges and bays.
# Use 90° stalls so divergence between skeleton-medial and
# offset-per-aisle is most visible.

polygon outer
(76.30,0)
(692.14,0)
(782.80,654.85)
(168.78,654.85)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (76.300,0)-(782.800,654.850), area 402686.910

polygon hole
(394.53,251.80)
(611.14,251.80)
(613.91,512.33)
(394.53,512.33)
----
polygon hole 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (394.530,251.800)-(613.910,512.330), area 56794.237

drive-line
(930.76,381.06)
(-42.60,512.33)
----
drive-line (930.76,381.06) -> (-42.60,512.33)

drive-line partitions
(198.60,-53.66)
(475.79,349.25)
----
drive-line (198.60,-53.66) -> (475.79,349.25) partitions

drive-line partitions
(446.56,335.61)
(930.76,135.52)
----
drive-line (446.56,335.61) -> (930.76,135.52) partitions

set stall-angle=90
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 509
faces: 54 (boundary: 2, interior: 52)
graph: 95 vertices, 153 edges (perimeter: 54, interior: 99)
regions: 2
